steps.title: Identify the dual requirement
steps.content: The goal asks the student to “make and support a claim about the inspiration for kumiko patterns.” The strongest clue: a successful answer must clearly state what inspires the patterns AND provide supporting evidence from the notes.

steps.title: Verify claim and evidence
steps.content: D states the core claim—”many of the geometric patterns used in kumiko designs are inspired by elements from nature”—and supports it immediately with specific evidence: “the seigaiha pattern's curved fan shapes, which resemble ocean waves,” demonstrating how nature inspires these designs. A misidentifies the source of inspiration as “wooden strips”; B uses construction details unrelated to inspiration; C omits the inspiration claim. That matches choice D — D is correct.
